ddls:
CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "text" TEXT /* Content of the article */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the article was created */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date the article was published (can be NULL if not published) */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who created the article */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the article belongs to */,
  "thumbnail" TEXT /* URL of the article's thumbnail image */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of a video associated with the article */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the article has received */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Indicates if the article is featured */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the article (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the author */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the author's profile image */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the author logged into the system */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the author (e.g., editor, contributor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Ragdoll, Siamese) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of a category image */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article the comment is associated with */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the comment has received */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the comment has received */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment is flagged for review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article associated with the log entry */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., created, updated, published) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date and time the action was performed */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who performed the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (browser and device) used for the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_logs_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_logs_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement event */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article engaged with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user engaging with the article */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., view, share) */,
  "engagement_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the engagement */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user engaging with the article */,
  "user_email" TEXT /* Email of the user engaging with the article */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Indicates if the engagement was from an anonymous user */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the engagement (e.g., social media, direct visit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)
